project.name: LeftHandedTyping
project.description: A one-handed typing utility where holding Space mirrors right-hand keys using mirrorMap, tapping Space sends a normal space, and releasing Space returns to normal typing.
goals: Maintain a single-file AutoHotkey v2 script.
Preserve mirrored typing behavior using mirrorMap.
Keep all mirrored key pairs inside mirrorMap.
Avoid introducing new files or abstractions unless explicitly requested.
Ensure modifier keys (Ctrl, Alt, Win, Shift) behave normally unless explicitly overridden.
constraints: Do not break Space tap/hold behavior.
Do not scatter mirrored key logic outside mirrorMap.
Do not override Ctrl+Key, Alt+Key, or Win+Key shortcuts.
Do not convert the script into classes unless requested.
Do not introduce new architectural patterns unless requested.

behavior_contract.mirroring: Only keys in mirrorMap are mirrored. Unmapped keys behave normally.

timing_model.tap_definition: Space pressed and released within threshold without other keys.
timing_model.hold_definition: Space held while another key is pressed or threshold exceeded.

structure.mirrorMap: Single Map object containing all mirrored key pairs.
structure.debug: Optional Debug(msg) function; disabled by default.

tooling.run_button: With LeftHandedTyping.ahk as the active file, the VS Code run button (top-right) launches the script directly.

manual_checks: Tap Space outputs a single space.
Hold Space + mirrored key outputs mirrored key.
Hold Space + unmapped key outputs normal key.
Release Space returns to normal typing.
Shift + mirrored key outputs shifted mirrored key.
